definition: 躺在床上刷手机、看电视等，长时间不愿起来的状态；可指自我犒赏的休息，也可能与抑郁相关
examples: I've been in full-on bed rot this weekend — I just couldn't get out of my sheets!
Not me bed rotting for the third day straight watching 2000s rom-coms.
She said she's in her bed rot arc and to leave her alone.
Caught myself bed rotting during a Zoom class again.

dialogue.A: Girl, you were supposed to touch grass days ago!
dialogue.B: Grass can wait. My bed cannot.

note: 这个词既可以是自嘲式的放松，也可以是抑郁的表现。2024年被Dictionary.com收录，TikTok上相关视频超过20亿播放。
